_meta.title: SEALED — Who Paid To Kill The Iran Deal (long-form v2, downgraded)
_meta.purpose: 4:00–4:30 long-form, 16:9. Canonical source: eng/longform-scripts/sealed-iran-deal.md. Storyboard downgraded per video-producer vendor-pick rule: documents/charts → stills+ken-burns; named politicians → kling-i2v (Wikimedia-seeded); reserve Sora 2 only for genuine multi-element atmospheric motion that can't be done as a still; one kling3-pro hero beat for the verdict stamp.

cost_breakdown.driver_note: Stills × 17 + sora2 5 clips (47s) + kling-i2v 6 clips (30s) + kling3-pro 1 clip (10s) + VO 10.5K chars. Headroom against $30 cap is ~$17 — covers many retries.
cost_breakdown.notes: Downgrade rule applied: every document/chart/scorecard/source-card/end-card uses FLUX still + ffmpeg ken-burns ($0.04 each). Every named living politician (Trump, Adelson, Kerry, Zarif) uses kling-i2v seeded from public/photos/wikipedia/ ($0.07/s, 5s clips only). Sora 2 retained only where motion is the beat: animated flag map, anonymous rally crossfades, empty conference chair, envelope wax-seal crack, flickering lab corridor. One kling3-pro for the verdict stamp climax.

by_vendor.downgrade_summary: Prior: 19 sora2 clips (178s, $17.80) + 5 kling-i2v + 4 stills. New: 5 sora2 (47s, $4.70) + 6 kling-i2v (30s, $2.10) + 1 kling3-pro (10s, $1.70) + 17 stills ($0.68). Net clip-cost reduction: $23.36 → $9.18, saves $14.18 against budget.

clips.covers_script_section: Scene 1 — Hook: flags appear on a dark world map
clips.prompt: Cinematic dark stylized world map at night, six abstract flag silhouettes (no identifiable national symbols) fade in one by one over Western Europe, North America, East Asia. Documentary realism, restrained civic palette, no text.

clips.covers_script_section: Scene 1 — Red X drawn through US flag silhouette
clips.prompt: Title card: 'WHO PAID TO KILL THE IRAN DEAL' in large condensed serif on cream paper, a single red X-mark inked over a small abstract flag silhouette. Civic-document aesthetic.
Documentary bar chart on cream paper: a short green bar labeled '3.67%' beside a tall red bar labeled '90% — weapons-grade'. Print-newspaper aesthetic, large serif labels, no people, no flags.

clips.covers_script_section: Scene 2 — Clock '3 years of compliance' (still + ken-burns)
clips.prompt: Documentary clock face on cream paper with three concentric annual rings shaded, caption '3 YEARS — CAP HELD' in large serif below. Restrained civic palette, print-newspaper aesthetic.
Source card on cream paper: 'SOURCE: SEALED book, p.1519 — enrichment 3.67% under deal, 60% after withdrawal.' Small serif type, civic-document layout.
Subtle motion: Donald Trump at a podium, slight head turn, microphones visible, restrained documentary realism, no crowd movement.
Newspaper-style page on cream paper: 'PROMISE #73 — Tear Up The Iran Nuclear Deal — KEPT' in classic serif, small navy stamp 'KEPT' beside it. Civic palette, restrained.
Cinematic crossfade of three anonymous 2016 American political rally venues at dusk — empty stages, scattered chairs, soft warm stage lights, no people in frame. Documentary realism.

clips.covers_script_section: Scene 4 — Diplomatic Reception Room (i2v Trump signing)
clips.prompt: Subtle motion: Donald Trump at a desk signing a single document with a black pen, looks down then up at the camera, restrained documentary realism, no others in frame.
Federal-Register-style printed page on cream paper; large date 'MAY 8, 2018' at the top in serif, body text intentionally illegible. Documentary realism, no logos.

clips.covers_script_section: Scene 4 — Cinematic 'US walked out alone' beat
clips.prompt: Cinematic wide shot of six empty chairs around a long conference table, one chair pushed back and tipped slightly, soft top-light, documentary realism, no flags, no text.
Documentary flow diagram on cream paper: three lines connecting an unlabeled donor box to an unlabeled candidate box to an unlabeled policy box. No money imagery, no logos, civic-print aesthetic.
Subtle motion: Sheldon Adelson, restrained head turn toward camera, neutral expression, documentary realism, no movement of background, no others in frame.
Newspaper page on cream paper showing the words 'THE BUYER' in large serif, body text intentionally illegible. Civic-document aesthetic.

clips.covers_script_section: Scene 6 — 'Three for three' three-tile card (still + ken-burns)
clips.prompt: Three documentary-style tiles on cream paper, each containing a different policy phrase in large serif type (text intentionally generic and illegible). Civic-print aesthetic, no flags, no faces.
Three stacked newspaper pages on a wooden desk; each headline blurred, only the dates legible — 2015, 2017, 2018. Documentary realism, warm desk lamp light.
Cinematic slow push-in on a sealed parchment envelope on a wooden desk under a warm lamp; the wax seal cracks open in slow motion, revealing a blank page inside. Documentary realism, no text legible.
Subtle motion: Sheldon Adelson, small nod, restrained documentary realism, no movement of background.
Documentary print page on cream paper with a single dollar figure in giant serif type centered (figure as 'XXX' placeholder for swap-in). Civic palette.
Source card on cream paper: 'SOURCE: SEALED book, ch. Drain The Swamp, p.730–798.' Small serif type, civic-document layout.
Newspaper page on cream paper reading 'THE FAIRNESS NOTE' in large serif, body text intentionally illegible. Civic-document aesthetic.
Subtle motion: John Kerry at a desk, slight head turn toward camera, restrained documentary realism, no flags, no others in frame.
Subtle motion: Mohammad Javad Zarif at a podium, slight head turn, restrained documentary realism, no flags swaying.
Documentary bar chart on cream paper: small green '3.67%' bar beside tall red '60%' bar, caption 'AFTER WITHDRAWAL' below. Print-newspaper aesthetic.
Cinematic dark industrial corridor at night, abstract metallic columns rising into shadow, low warm spotlights, slow forward camera push, documentary realism, no people, no text, no logos.
Source card on cream paper: 'SOURCE: SEALED book, p.1519 — enrichment 60% by 2021 after US withdrawal.' Small serif type.

Newspaper-style verdict card on cream paper: large headline 'THE 2016 PROMISE AUDIT' with four numbered tiles — '46 KEPT' (navy), '51 PARTIAL' (slate), '40 BROKEN' (red), '8 READER-DECIDES' (gold). Civic palette.

clips.covers_script_section: Scene 10 — Verdict stamp moment (kling3-pro hero beat)
clips.prompt: Cinematic slow push-in on a paper stamp pad pressing the word 'KEPT' in navy ink onto a cream-paper document. Restrained civic palette, documentary realism, single hero gesture.

clips.covers_script_section: Scene 10 — End card + Subscribe CTA + SEALED2016.COM bar
clips.prompt: End-card composition on cream paper: 'SEALED. The 2016 Promises. Before the Deals.' in classic serif, sub-line 'SEALED2016.COM — Subscribe — New receipts daily.' Civic-document aesthetic, no flags, no faces.

music_cues.mood: investigative documentary string layer, low tension
